      "question": "What is the primary difference between a singly linked list and a doubly linked list?",
      "options": ["A) Each node only has a reference to the next node", "B) Each node has references to both the next and previous nodes", "C) Each node only has a reference to the previous node", "D) Each node has a value but no references to other nodes"],
      "correct": 1,
